creator: @pernllla
transcript: I'll have a steak burrito menu. I'll have a bowl with double chicken and swap out the rice and cheese for extra veggies. I'll just have a bagel with cream cheese and a coffee with sugar cream. And I'll have an egg white turkey sausage wake up wrap with an americano with a splash of almond milk. A Big Mac meal. And I'll have a grilled chicken sandwich with a side salad. A meatball marinara footlong with a cookie and a Coke. And I'll have a six inch wheat with double oven roasted chicken. I'll have a Crunchwrap Supreme and a Biobloss. And I'll have a power menu bowl with grilled chicken. I'll have a chipotle chicken avocado. I'll have the auto melt with a lemonade and I'll have the apple chicken salad with a diet lemonade. I'll have a Baconator combo with fries and a Coke and I'll have the grilled chicken sandwich with a small chili. How do I find all these easy swaps? I just check out the menu for that.
caption: Comment menufit for free swaps & @menufit.app link to help you find macro friendly options when eating out. Macro Breakdown Below.
ocr_summary: Chipotle: 1750 CAL vs 465 CAL/58g Protein; Dunkin: 780 CAL vs 260 CAL/19g Protein; McDonalds: 1330 CAL vs 430 CAL/37g Protein; Subway: 1580 CAL vs 420 CAL/46g Protein; Taco Bell: 920 CAL vs 450 CAL/26g Protein; Panera: 1020 CAL vs 490 CAL/31g Protein; Wendys: 1470 CAL vs 540 CAL/46g Protein

swaps.swap_meal: Chicken Bowl with double chicken, fajita veggies, salsa, romaine (no rice, no beans, no cheese)

swaps.original_meal: Bagel w/ cream cheese + Medium Iced Coffee with cream & sugar
swaps.swap_meal: Egg White & Turkey Sausage Wake-Up Wrap + Iced Americano (1 Splenda, splash almond milk)

swaps.original_meal: Big Mac + Medium Fries + Medium Coke
swaps.swap_meal: Grilled Chicken Sandwich + Side Salad (balsamic) + Diet Coke
6-inch Oven-Roasted Chicken on Wheat, double chicken, no cheese, mustard + water
Power Menu Bowl (no sour cream, no guac) + Diet Baja Blast
Whole Fuji Apple Chicken Salad + Diet Lemonade

swaps.original_meal: Baconator combo with fries and Coke

parsed.notes: Multi-restaurant swap compilation reel by @pernllla promoting MenuFit app. 7 swaps across major fast food/fast casual chains. All swaps focus on calorie reduction with maintained or improved protein.
